title: IL-DRL Ablation Simulation Platform
description: MATLAB R2024a code release for the manuscript "Imitation learning-embedded deep reinforcement learning controller for MRI guided multi-frequency interstitial ultrasound ablation". The repository includes the simulation environment, controller implementation, behavior-cloning plus PPO training code, expert demonstration data, example data, and pre-trained agent files for prostate ultrasound ablation simulation.
